channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Junction of Hawley Road with Hartland Road, 24th April
item.description:
Removable bollards/posts have been removed and cars and motorcycles frequently ignore 'no cars or motorcycles' signage in both directions. This creates enormous danger for pedestrians, especially as there is a school on the street. Posts need to be replaced and/or ANPR cameras installed to deter and catch offenders.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hartland Road, Chalk Farm, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Repeated mess and rubbish at this charity collection point, 24th April
item.description:
This charity clothes bank is always a mess, with rubbish left around it. This is unacceptable—we want a clean Hackney.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dalston Lane, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping bed frame, 24th April
item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kellaway Road, Kidbrooke

item.title: Fly tipped furniture, 24th April

On pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ankerdine Crescent, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging bush, 24th April
item.description:
A bush from a residential front garden is overhanging the pavement which contains thorns at face height. To avoid the bush pedestrians need to walk in the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Lingfield Crescent, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian crossing, 24th April
item.description:
This pedestrian crossing changes to red to let people cross and then red again after a couple of cars and then red again after a couple of cars when there’s no one there .
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Charlton Road, Charlton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Another gross mattress, 24th April
item.description:
Pls remove

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brooke Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marlow Road, Anerley, Greater London

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Footpath blocked, 24th April
item.description:
Footpath blocked I’ve previously reported this before and the report gets closed over and over again. Why isit acceptable to leave a path like this? I understand this probably does not fall under Lewisham but I assume you will help. I’ve reported this so many times before and so have other residents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 113, Seymour Villas, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tabard St, SE1 BIn bags dumped + blocking fire exit for Puregym, 24th April
item.description:
This is so dangerous and a massive fire hazard and risk. Please resolve asap

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Food waste unrecycled on the road, 24th April
item.description:
Rubbish bag full of food that has not been recycled. Foxes rummaged through it leaving a mess on the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blurton Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
